name: gmapprospect-local
description: Local Codex plugin for GMapProspect backed by the repo API.

interface.shortDescription: Run scrapes and manage leads from the local repo backend
interface.longDescription: Expose GMapProspect lead, call, and scrape workflows to Codex through a local MCP server that talks to the existing server.py API and can auto-start it when needed.
defaultPrompt: Launch a local scrape for plumbers in Paris and summarize the best leads
Show me contacted leads from the latest query and their notes
Give me call stats and the next leads to prioritize
